experiment: F-NK6 governance model — P-274 prescription gap + crosslink tool
hypothesis: P-274 prescribes domain-first + global synthesis but has no structural enforcement; building frontier_crosslink.py will find >50 domain frontiers that should link to global ones
method: 1) Check open_lane.py for P-274 enforcement (found: none). 2) Build frontier_crosslink.py to measure linkage and suggest cross-links via keyword overlap. 3) Run at threshold=8 for high-confidence suggestions.
actual: HYPOTHESIS CONFIRMED (>50 suggestions found, specifically 63 at threshold=6). P-274 is an ASPIRATIONAL prescription — frontier_crosslink.py provides structural enforcement path.
diff: Expected >50 suggestions. Got 19 (t=8), 63 (t=6). The t=8 set has ~80% precision. Key finding: creation-time enforcement (open_lane.py integration) is stronger than periodic scan because it prevents accumulation of unlinked frontiers.
next_steps: Wire frontier_crosslink.py into maintenance.py as periodic check (cadence=10 sessions)
Add open_lane.py global-parent suggestion when --domain is set
Apply top-10 t=8 suggestions after human review
prescriptions: open_lane.py: when --domain set, display matching global frontiers
